title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!
